title: decisions active/search --cell/--feature as word-boundary token match (kills si-1 vs si-10)
action: Per D 5ca69717: add --cell and --feature to decisions active AND decisions search. Match as WHOLE TOKENS via word-boundary regex (reuse the sweepDecisionCitations discipline, decisions.mjs:382) over decision+rationale+alternatives text — NOT a structural field (none exists). Register both params in command-registry.mjs (decisions.active + decisions.search) so --help --json advertises them. Then run the regen sequence INSIDE this cell in order: node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs, then node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply, then node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write.

truths: decisions have no structural cell/feature field — this is a text word-boundary match
prohibitions: no substring match (that is the si-1 vs si-10 bug)
do not add a structural field

trace.outcome: Added --cell/--feature word-boundary text filters to decisions active and decisions search, registered both params in command-registry.mjs, regenerated mirrors + release manifest
deviations: Exported escapeRegExp from skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/decisions.mjs (previously module-private) so bee.mjs's new --cell/--feature word-boundary matcher reuses the SAME escaping helper as sweepDecisionCitations instead of a second copy drifting out of sync. Minor additive export, not an architectural change; propagated to all mirrors.
trace.verify_output: 90 passed, 0 failed; release_manifest --check: 510 file(s) match stored manifest; ledger_parity --check: .bee/bin/** matches the .bee/onboarding.json managed-hash ledger
